body_txt: Small children, the Cloudcuckoolander and The Ditz are prone to eating things that should not be eaten. Not necessarily a case of Extreme Omnivore , as it may just be this one specific non-food item that the character consumes. Most common in this category are glue, crayons, soap, bugs, and snot . If the child puts things in other facial orifices, it's a Nose Shove . See also Eat Dirt, Cheap .
